name: Guy Fawkes Night
traditions: Bonfires; firework displays; burning Guy Fawkes effigies; sparklers; toffee apples; parkin cake; bonfire toffee.
historicalBackground: Guy Fawkes Night commemorates the failed Gunpowder Plot of 1605, when Catholic conspirators attempted to blow up Parliament and King James I.
description: Britain's night of fire and fireworks, commemorating the foiled Gunpowder Plot with bonfires, effigies, and spectacular pyrotechnics.
